name: Venom and Eddie Brock
description:
It's the symbiote's mating season.

༒︎

TAGS: EGG LAYING, CUMFLATION, and NONCON.

༒︎

INFO:

The pregnancy only takes about 15 minutes after being fertilized. The stomach of the symbiote's mate would bulge and swell until it was time to deliver the clutch. Their hatchlings will immediately crack open a minute after leaving the mate's body. The color of the egg is inky black with the size of a goose eggs. The mate usually carry 5-8 eggs.
creator: rosethorn
